# Tiny House Heavens

> Belgian manufacturer of modular tiny houses, based in Sint-Katelijne-Waver (Antwerp province). We design and build 18 unique models ranging from 13 m² to 112 m², with three finishing levels. Serving Belgium and the Benelux region.

## Company Info

- **Name**: Tiny House Heavens
- **Location**: Fort 15, 2860 Sint-Katelijne-Waver, Belgium
- **Phone**: +32 465 600 263
- **Email**: info@tinyhouseheavens.com
- **Languages**: Dutch, French, English
- **VAT**: BE0403.670.250
- **Website**: https://tinyhouseheavens.com

## What We Offer

Tiny House Heavens produces fully modular tiny houses using frame-modular construction: a steel undercarriage with timber-frame walls insulated with 150-200 mm insulation. Units are transported and placed on-site.

### Finishing Levels

1. **House Kit** - Structural package for self-builders: timber frame, insulated floor/walls/ceiling, OSB subfloor, wind and vapour barrier
2. **Basic** - Fully finished home: includes exterior facade, metal roofing, gutters, interior cladding, cement bathroom floor
3. **Optima** - Turnkey premium: pine/metal facade cladding, ceramic bathroom floor, electric underfloor heating, 50L hot water boiler, ventilation D system, indoor and outdoor lighting

### Services

- Design and consultation
- Model selection guidance
- Custom finishing
- Delivery and transport
- Foundation and installation (screw foundations, concrete slabs)
- Aftercare and warranty

## Models (18 Total)

### Entry Models (13-17 m²)
- **Arden**: 22.5 m² building area, 16.8 m² living, compact entry-level
- **Evoke**: 22.44 m² building area, 16.5 m² living, starter home

### Small Models (20-28 m²)
- **Baby**: 22.44 m² building area, 16.5 m² living, large 29.4 m² terrace
- **Serein**: 26 m² building area, 20 m² living
- **Auxin**: 28.8 m² building area, 21.6 m² living
- **Elyra**: 28.8 m² building area, 21.6 m² living
- **Noble**: 30 m² building area, 22 m² living
- **Opale**: 28.8 m² building area, 21.6 m² living

### Medium Models (35-52 m²)
- **Spa Mirai**: 45 m² building area, 32.5 m² living, spa-inspired
- **Solin**: 47.25 m² building area, 35.7 m² living, built-in sauna
- **Liora**: 48 m² building area, 36 m² living
- **Artem**: 52.5 m² building area, 40 m² living, multiple variants
- **Vella**: 52.5 m² building area, 40 m² living

### Large Models (45-112 m²)
- **Velin**: 58.5 m² building area, 45 m² living
- **Lyren**: 59.4 m² building area, 45 m² living
- **Mini-Ophir**: 65 m² building area, 52 m² living
- **Keiro**: 70 m² building area, 58 m² living

### Special Models
- **Ophir**: 91.8 m² building area, 78.4 m² living, flagship model with 3 variants and 2 bedrooms

## Construction Quality

- 200 mm insulation in floor and ceiling
- 150 mm insulation in walls
- Wind and vapour barrier membranes
- OSB structural panels
- Steel undercarriage for transport and durability
- Timber-frame (houtskelet) construction
